name: Webstore Design Tweaks
body:
[{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Neto offers a "}, {"type": "a", "url": "http://developers.neto.com.au/documentation/web-designers/tweak-documents/", "children": [{"text": "Tweak Library"}]}, {"text": " which is maintained by our design team. This section includes a compilation of the most popular modifications, or \"tweaks\", we make to customer websites. Most of the tweaks are not included in our themes because they are specific to certain industries."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "These tweaks are helpfully arranged into categories. Code snippets and screenshots are included with the tweaks to ensure that making any modifications to your storefront remains as painless as possible."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Please Note", "bold": true}, {"text": ": This article assumes knowledge of HTML and the Neto B@SE language. If you're unfamiliar with these, you can "}, {"type": "a", "url": "http://forms.neto.com.au/services/designtweak.html?", "children": [{"text": "contact a design partner"}]}, {"text": " for a quote. Invoices are issued by Neto the month after the tweaks have been delivered by your design company."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The majority of these tweaks require SFTP access to your site files. You can request SFTP access "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/1046-request-file-transfer-protocol-ftp-sftp-access", "children": [{"text": "here"}]}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Tweaks are applied per theme. If you switch themes, the tweaks will not carry across."}]}], "appearance": "alert"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Staging and Test Themes"}], "data-id": "staging-and-test-themes"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Design tweaks are applied to a copy of your current design and referred to as a "}, {"text": "staging theme", "bold": true}, {"text": ". A staging theme is used in order to work on your site without affecting your customers' shopping experience, as well as providing a way for you to see the changes and offer feedback before it goes live."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "A special website URL is used to access the "}, {"text": "staging theme", "bold": true}, {"text": " templates, which only you (and not your customers) will see: "}, {"text": "www.yoursiteurlhere.com/?nview=stagingthemename", "code": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "In order to change your view back to see your live theme, you can visit your site url : "}, {"text": "www.yoursiteurlhere.com/?nview=", "code": true}, {"text": ". Just replace the "}, {"text": "yoursiteurlhere", "bold": true}, {"text": " with your own Neto site and it'll change to your live theme."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Once you are happy with the work on the "}, {"text": "staging theme", "bold": true}, {"text": ", you can set it live for your customers:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel navigate to "}, {"text": "Settings & tools", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "All settings & tools", "bold": true}]}]}, "height": 247}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Change the "}, {"text": "Site template set", "bold": true}, {"text": " to whichever theme has been specified by the designer."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/WebstoreDesignTweaks2.05T5g00000tx8vnEAA.png", "embedData": {"url": "height": 248}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Most design companies will create a staging theme from your current live theme. Before proceeding with a design tweak ensure you don't have any staging themes that are still being worked on. Combining different staging themes is a manual and time-consuming process and may attract additional billable time."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Also avoid having multiple agencies performing design work for you simultaneously. This can cause code conflicts and work to be lost."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Webstore Caching"}], "data-id": "webstore-caching"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "A web cache (or HTTP cache) is an information technology term for the temporary storage (caching) of web documents, such as HTML pages and images, to reduce bandwidth usage, server load, and perceived lag. Essentially caching is a way of reducing load times."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Due to the nature of how web caching functions, there is a high likelihood of seeing an older, saved version of your webstore. There are two ways you can refresh your cache:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel select the "}, {"text": "Refresh System Now", "bold": true}, {"text": " link in the bottom left of the menu."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/WebstoreDesignTweaks3.05T5g00000tx7H9EAI.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/WebstoreDesignTweaks3.05T5g00000tx7H9EAI.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "image3", "width": 700, "height": 248}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "You can also refresh the cache that is stored on your web browser you are using. To learn more about refreshing the cache on your browser, "}, {"type": "a", "url": "http://www.refreshyourcache.com/en/home/", "children": [{"text": "click here"}]}, {"text": "."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Brands Menu"}], "data-id": "1"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "A list of brands that, when hovered over, provides users with a simple way to find branded products. To add this tweak to you webstore:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Open up Header template."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Locate the header "}, {"text": "template.html", "code": true}, {"text": ". This can be found in "}, {"text": "skeletal", "bold": true}, {"text": " (or the name of your theme) > "}, {"text": "header", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "template.html", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/WebstoreDesignTweaks4.05T5g00000tx6LAEAY.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/WebstoreDesignTweaks4.05T5g00000tx6LAEAY.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "image4", "width": 700, "height": 370}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Open the template in your text editor. We suggest either Sublime Text or Atom. Add a "}, {"text": "[%content_menu%]", "code": true}, {"text": " at line 77 which is after the opening ul with the class "}, {"text": "na nvabar-nav", "code": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/WebstoreDesignTweaks5.05T5g00000tx94KEAQ.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/WebstoreDesignTweaks5.05T5g00000tx94KEAQ.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "image5", "width": 700, "height": 312}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "[%content_menu content_type:'brand' sortby:'sortorder, name' limit:'5'%] [%param *header%]

    • [@name@]
      • [%/param%] [%param *footer%]
    • [%/param%][%/content_menu%]", "code": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Add the the brands menu code into the template:"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The "}, {"text": "[%content_menu%]", "code": true}, {"text": " dynamically generates a menu based on the content type you define in the parameters. There are the parameters used in this "}, {"text": "[%content_menu%]", "code": true}, {"text": ":"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "content_type:", "code": true}, {"text": " The content type targeted for the menu."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "sortorder", "code": true}, {"text": ": The sort order for the pages in the menu. To set which brands to display give them a "}, {"text": "sortorder", "code": true}, {"text": " higher then the rest of the brands and they will display instead of the other brands. "}, {"text": "sortorder", "code": true}, {"text": " is editable on the brand page in your control panel."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "limit", "code": true}, {"text": ": Sets a limit of items generated in the menu."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Now it will show a list of featured brands at the start of the main navigation in the header of every page."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/WebstoreDesignTweaks6.05T5g00000tx7FUEAY.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/WebstoreDesignTweaks6.05T5g00000tx7FUEAY.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "image6", "width": 700, "height": 348}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Header Announcement Area"}], "data-id": "2"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "A clear area to make text-based announcements, for example, closing times over public holidays etc. To add this tweak to you webstore:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "

Repeat for each of the three templates."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "After you have made the changes, you will need to "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/1362-webstore-troubleshooting", "children": [{"text": "refresh your website cache"}]}, {"text": " to see the changes."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Webstore Holiday/Maintenance Mode"}], "data-id": "4"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "There's four changes you can make to your website that will let customers know you're not taking orders:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/1102-webstore-design-tweaks#4", "children": [{"text": "Update your Website Header"}]}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/1102-webstore-design-tweaks#5", "children": [{"text": "Disable Payment Methods"}]}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/1102-webstore-design-tweaks#6", "children": [{"text": "Change Home Page Template"}]}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/1102-webstore-design-tweaks#7", "children": [{"text": "eBay & Amazon Holiday Mode"}]}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Update your Website Header"}], "data-id": "5"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Adding a message into your website header is a common practice for websites in holiday mode. It lets you display a custom message to your customers, and appears on all pages of your site."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To achieve this, follow the "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/1102-webstore-design-tweaks#1", "children": [{"text": "header tweak steps"}]}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Disable Payment Methods"}], "data-id": "6"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "A guaranteed way to stop orders from being placed while you're away is to turn off your payment methods."}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel navigate to "}, {"text": "Settings & Tools", "bold": true}, {"text": " button next to one of your active payment methods to open the edit screen."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Toggle the "}, {"text": "Active/Enabled", "bold": true}, {"text": " setting to turn the payment method off, and then click "}, {"text": "Save & Close", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Repeat these steps for each payment method that is active."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Remember to turn your To add a new webstore template:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Request SFTP access for your Neto control panel "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/1046-request-file-transfer-protocol-ftp-sftp-access", "children": [{"text": "here"}]}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Navigate to the appropriate Products or Categories folder of your current live theme."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Duplicate the "}, {"text": "template.html", "bold": true}, {"text": " file and add a new name and full stop to the front of the file (such as "}, {"text": "New.template.html", "code": true}, {"text": ")."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can now many customisations to your new template, and assign it to your products or categories."}]}]
